name: Supergirl 👱🏻‍♀️ In the Kryptonite Lab
description:
Supergirl isn't scared.

Little does she know you've got access to six colors of Kryptonite. Try exposing her to green, red, yellow, black, and of course pink. But don't use gold unless you want to permanently take her powers.

Avatar is a random AI bio, directly based off the Bruce Timm's Supergirl design.

If thou enjoyest this bot, please share your chat! It helps me make more hero bots.

Big ups to Corvi for encouraging me to make more heroes. I realized that some of my work for Power Girl could work for Supergirl, so here she is!
creator: megafauna
